description: Phase 0 contract surface freeze with three-layer SHA model

three_layer_sha_model._doc: Three distinct SHAs serve different roles. Do not conflate them.

schema_source_pin.description: The HivePoA commit pinned in Hive-AI's SCHEMA_MANIFEST.json. CI clones HivePoA at this SHA to verify vendored schemas match the canonical source. This is the SHA that public CI enforces.

frozen_bilateral_pair.description: The commits where protocol enforcement was finalized: normative freeze readback, reconstruction boundary, path-set digest coverage. Step 5 evidence references this pair.

publication_seal.description: The phase0-seal tags on both repos. Stable human-auditable reference point.

schema_files.description: 10 JSON Schema files + 14 fixtures in HivePoA schemas/

event_names_fields.description: 15 structured event emitters with correlation keys

manifest_result_payload.description: Schema-validated manifest/result payloads per workload type

acceptance_cas_logic.invariant: UPDATE computeJobs SET acceptedAttemptId=? WHERE id=? AND acceptedAttemptId IS NULL

nonce_rules.description: Server-issued UUIDv4 per attempt, echo-validated on submit

replay_conflict_behavior.hash_algorithm: SHA-256 over length-prefixed framing of outputSha256 + resultJson
replay_conflict_behavior.exact_replay: Same attemptId + nonce + payloadHash → cached result, zero side effects
replay_conflict_behavior.divergent_replay: Same attemptId + nonce, different payloadHash → 409 SUBMISSION_PAYLOAD_MISMATCH

checkpoint_semantics.description: Worker-local advisory checkpoint, NOT server API

recovery_rules.submit_sent: retry submit with same nonce (server handles idempotency)

lease_expiry.description: leaseExpiresAt is the sole expiry oracle

step5_assertion_bundle_schema.description: Standard output format for each Step 5 fault injection scenario

assertions.final_job_state: string — terminal state from state machine

reconstruction_log.description: Forensic reconstruction from durable events + DB state only

entries.type: string — event type or table name

policy.protocol_surface_changes: NOT allowed — if any fix mutates contract/event semantics, rerun the full Step 5 matrix
policy.rerun_trigger: Any change to files listed in frozen_surface paths
